creator: hartzell@alerce.com
text:
I have dcons/dconschat working from a mac mini.  Gives the same error messages as described for the MacBook Pro and usually fwcontrol only reports a single address, but every once in a while it sees the other end.  Enabled a getty on the dcons "tty" and I'm typing away happily.

If you can help take a swing at the UGA bits (even if they're a bit retro) I'd appreciate it.

Thanks!
